title: Map Flex Axes from Direction and Writing Mode
summary: Build and verify flex formatting context in survey action-row axis investigation through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain flex formatting context from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply flex formatting context without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 04 · Read the survey action-row axis investigation case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 4: Which claim preserves flex formatting context when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: survey action-row axis investigation.
steps.why: Map Flex Axes from Direction and Writing Mode makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 4 in survey action-row axis investigation.

content.text: Display flex or inline-flex creates a flex formatting context. Flex-direction establishes the main axis and direction; the cross axis is perpendicular. Row follows the inline axis and column follows the block axis, so horizontal and vertical assumptions fail under changed writing modes and direction. Direct children become flex items. Apply it to survey action-row axis investigation.
